// Source: https://github.com/profezzorn/ProffieOS/blob/master/config/proffieboard_v1_test_bench_config.h
// ProffieOS reference â€” Battery-driven "charging" style (redâ†’orangeâ†’blueâ†’green by level)
// Sin pulse modulates a Bump positioned at BatteryLevel; color picked from BatteryLevel-Mix.
// Used for charging-prop visualization (blade is OFF as far as user is concerned, but the
// BladeConfig still attaches a style that shows charge progress).
StylePtr<Mix<Sin<Int<20>,Int<8192>,Int<32768>>,Black,Mix<Bump<BatteryLevel,Int<8000>>,Black,Mix<BatteryLevel,Red,Red,Orange,Orange,Orange,Blue,Blue,Blue,Blue,Green,Green,Green>>>>()
